programme.title: Rio Grande
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Rio Grande
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Paris Blues
programme.desc: Ram (Paul Newman) and Eddie (Sidney Poitier) are two expatriate jazz musicians living in Paris, where their music is celebrated. When they fall in love with two vacationing American girls, they must decide if they should move back to America with them.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob suspects that Buddy and Sally may be moonlighting for another comedy show or having an affair.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Blanche tells Oscar she is remarrying and invites him and Felix to the wedding.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix talks Oscar into being a big brother to Mike, a young boy in a reform school.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar hires Felix to cover an international wrestling match and is thrown for a fall by subsequent developments.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix's grandfather, tossed out by his wife because of his insane jealousy, arrives at his grandson's apartment.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix invests his and Oscar's money in Mr. Wing's Japanese restaurant.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix turns psychic in the Psychic, Shymcic episode of The Odd Couple. Invoking his ESP Felix warns a skeptical Oscar not to attend a gala dinner at which he is to be named sportswriter of the year. But Oscar ignores the danger awaiting him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: At a get-together arranged by Felix, Oscar and Blanche compare notes on-the New Year's Eve Party that led to their divorce.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: In The Princess, Miss Simmons plays Lydia of Lichtenstein who visits Felix's studio for a portrait sitting and meets Oscar, who, unaware of her station, tries to date her.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver, Lisa and Eb travel to Chicago with Arnold to prove the pig is the rightful heir to the Birnbacher pork empire. Will this pig get rich? Arnold makes a surprising prediction that baffles all, including all the lawyers involved.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is asked to speak at the local high school about his illustrious law career and makes quite an impression on student Kathy Baxter. Oliver must contend with Kathy's fawning as well as her jealous boyfriend is not very happy with Oliver.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is mad over the town's dirt road, especially when he finds out that the state set aside money over thirty years ago to fix it. Oliver goes to the Capitol to get the road paved but hits a roadblock when the Ziffels' house must be torn down.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney discovers an old wish book dating back to 1898 that tells the story of Calvin and Tessie Whittaker who once owned the Douglases' farm and how Calvin traveled to Hollywood to pitch his idea of putting a mouse named Dickey into films.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Sam Drucker does not stock any cosmetics in his store, much to the chagrin of Lisa. Lisa decides to set up a 'small' display in the store. When the merchandise is delivered, it forces Mr. Drucker to retreat to the front porch.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver plants his crops, worrying that they haven't been planted in time for a harvest. Lisa tries to be helpful and mixes up a batch of sour lemonade. Oliver pours out the bitter elixir in the newly planted field, with an unimaginable consequence.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has been invited to give a speech at the Bar Association. He is there to advocate for the hiring of ex-convicts. He eventually ends up regretting his speech when he is forced to hire an ex-convict by the name of Willie Dunhill.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk hides a stolen German codebook in a dry well, Hogan must come up with a way to get it back.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink and Hogan's men together head to the Russian front on a suicide mission to steal some secret documents.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired by a woman from Cleveland named Marcia Inman to locate her missing husband. Mannix investigates her husband's business contacts and follows a man matching his description after the man leaves what appears to be his mistress' apartment.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Someone tries to kill Ken Mitchell, the head of a toy-making firm. Not wanting a violent incident to be associated with a toy business, Mitchell instead hires Joe Mannix to find out who might have tried to kill him.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Investigating a young woman's death, Stone ends up saving another from murder at the hands of the same mentally-unbalanced man.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone sets out to discover why a young detective seems to be absolutely convinced of a murder suspect's guilt for no apparent reason.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Nick denies Chantelle's baby, but she wants to prove he's the father and make him pay up. Mario's mother Evette says she went "undercover" to prove that Sierra cheated on her son and that he is not her baby's father! What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Pastor Terry’s wife cheat on him with 200 different men? Then Naomi wants to find out if her fiancé Jesse is a cheater. What will the results reveal on Maury today?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These girls got on the wrong path and are convinced that their mothers don't deserve their respect. Some have had babies and are ready to have more. But MAURY and his team of experts are here to try and set these girls back on the right track.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The lie detector results are in and the truth is coming out! These guests say their loved ones are cheating behind their backs. But who cheated? How many times? And can they handle the results? All will be revealed on the today's explosive MAURY.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jahaza believes that her fiancé Rafiq is cheating on her with the babysitter! Nikema is married to a motivational speaker named Drew. Is he motivating other women into his bed? Plus, Kim and Aaron are back…but this time she's got a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki’s boyfriend Tavon is a cheater. What will they say when he is caught on our hidden camera? Then, are James’ kids with Nikkie actually his?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shatoria keeps telling D'Eric that he didn't father her sister Latasha's child! Then, CiCi's ex-boyfriend Angel is denying her baby because his best friend Ralphie says so! The results will leave you speechless!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: John and his wife Yolanda believe Keia is trying to trap him with someone else's baby because she's obsessed with him! Plus, after a wild New Year's Eve bash, whose baby did Payge conceive? Is it Floyd, Phillip or neither man?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On Today's MAURY… The time for lying is over and the truth will be revealed. Who's right and who's about to get caught red handed! It's wild tales of cheating lovers forced to face the lie detector results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Waldo refuses to believe that he fathered Chelsea’s baby because of her pale complexion. Then, Kianna found pics of naked women in Nick’s phone and condoms and cologne in his gym bag. What will Maury’s lie detector results say?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: John aspires to be a rapper and says Dabria wants to trap him with someone else's baby due to his future success. Then, can a mom keep her daughter away from her controlling boyfriend? Later, is Kelly's very sick baby Brandon's?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Will DNA Prove Andre Is My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Chrissie is desperate to prove to her husband Rick that he’s the real father of her child. Plus, a teen mom wants to prove that Andre is her child’s father, but are the results in her favor?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un auto en una zanja de drenaje con dos cuerpos adentro, una punta de un dedo de un guante de látex encontrada en la escena del crimen apuntaría a los investigadores hacia el asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Bloqueo del escritor
programme.desc: Una brillante joven arquitecta se enfermó y murió poco antes de testificar en un juicio penal. La autopsia reveló que había sido envenenada con arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, el cuerpo de la joven madre, Summer Baldwin, fue encontrado en una maleta en un vertedero de Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 anys després de la seva estrena, 'Forensic Files' segueix sent la sèrie de crims reals més exitosa de tots els temps.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween de 2004, Adriane Insogna y Leslie Mazzara fueron brutalmente asesinadas en su casa de Napa, California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores no saben por qué un científico joven se ha enfermado muy gravemente. Cuando las pruebas revelan finalmente la causa, es muy tarde para salvarlo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un violador en serie anda suelto en una ciudad de Texas. Nadie sabía dónde atacaría a continuación, pero la audacia de sus ataques y la escalada de violencia contra sus víctimas hicieron que encontrarlo fuera imperativo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Dorothy Donovan fue asesinada en su casa de Dover, Delaware. Cuando su hijo declaró que fue asesinada por un polizón que la había recogido, la policía se mostró escéptica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La hija de Paul Gruber sospechaba que algo malo estaba ocurriendo cuando recibió unas tarjetas de regalo enviadas de parte de su padre, pero escritas con la letra de una persona extraña.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1998, una actuación de asesinato misterioso en Maryland se convierte en una verdadera novela policíaca cuando se descubre el cuerpo gravemente quemado de Stephen Hricko en su habitación de hotel.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts

programme.title: Natural World

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo y Gabriel invitan a cenar a Griselda al mismo tiempo. Ella acepta ir al Gourmet Palmer con los dos. Amalia la ayuda a vestirse y a maquillarse y Griselda luce radiante. Juan Pablo y Esther vuelven a discutir sobre el embarazo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina llega al Gourmet Palmer y enfrenta a Griselda, quien esta vez se defiende y se va con la frente en alto. Reinaldo está dolido y decepcionado por la actitud de su esposa, discuten y le pide a Teresa Cristina que se separen.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Bárbara se aparece en casa de Griselda y exige ver a su hijo Kikito. Griselda la echa, pero en aras de la tranquilidad familiar, le pregunta cuánto dinero quiere para dejar a su nieto en paz. Juan Pablo despierta junto a Marcela y se marcha afectado.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: El bello rostro de Sara está a punto de ser desfigurado. Tito quiere saber si es gay y le pide un beso a Bruno en la primera cita. Cristóbal le ruega a Marisa que le dé una segunda oportunidad y le anuncia a su padre una importante decisión.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal es el nuevo candidato al senado, pero a Tito no le agrada que su jefe pase de exitoso empresario a político. Cristóbal quiere tener el mejor equipo a su lado y solo piensa en Marisa. Sara se da el lujo de humillar a todas las camareras.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Como político, Cristóbal logra su primer objetivo al hablar con Marisa. Tito también apoya el sueño de su jefe, pero descubre un impedimento para su candidatura. A Marisa la ven como una empleada protegida en el hotel y Sara le propone un pacto.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Víctor convence a Marisa de que Cristóbal y Sara son amantes. Estanislao le adelanta al candidato que meterse en Queens no le será tan fácil y Cristóbal enfrenta a Calixta por los negocios. A los Parker les llega una enfermera particular.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta conoce los detalles del secuestro de su hijo Amador, no puede creer lo que le dice Laurentino. Alicia pregunta por Panterita, cuando se comenta quién tiene una relación con ella.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: A pesar de la distancia que Alicia trata de imponer a Sebastián, él le ofrece explicaciones. Perfecta quiere viajar con los niños para mantener vivo el recuerdo de su padre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia piensa que Sebastián es un mentiroso y que es igual a Amador, ella pasa un mal momento cuando alguien solicita trabajo en el hotel. Perfecta tiene los nervios de punta por sus hijos.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: A Alicia se le hace tarde en el hotel, tiene que buscar la forma de defenderse al llegar a la casa de Justino. Hayde toma medidas en el bar cuando Dimas disfrazado trata de acercarse.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Iris le ofrece a Griselda convertirla en una mujer refinada, pero ella la rechaza al descubrir que es tía de su rival. Teresa Cristina se desmaya cuando ve por televisión la noticia del premio. Bárbara planea tomar parte de la fortuna de Griselda.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo y Gabriel invitan a cenar a Griselda al mismo tiempo. Ella acepta ir al Gourmet Palmer con los dos. Amalia la ayuda a vestirse y a maquillarse y Griselda luce radiante. Juan Pablo y Esther vuelven a discutir sobre el embarazo.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a city bus. On a table, there are dishes of roaches. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside. Contestants must make the way across a maze of beams.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth from the boats to get as many flags. Contestant is put into a vat used for stomping on grapes to make wine. Contestant must walk the length of the truck removing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform. One at a time, contestants pick gifts from under a Christmas tree. Contestants must swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot Plexiglas grid that is lit on fire.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be contected to a dune buggy by his ankles. Contestant will have to bury their spouse's head in worms using only their mouth. One person from each team will be hanging from the skids of a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be chained to either side of a platform with the contestant having one key to free them from chains. Player dunks their head into a tank and retrieves a cows heart with their mouth.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, partners will hang by their ankles, they will each hold onto one end of a rope and be lifted over the water. Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pigs stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Player A is placed on a dunk tank. In the tank is a mixture of cow parts floating in water. One member of the team will be suspended by their ankles underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the female contestant will be placed in a cage that is hung from a helicopter and is approx. 20 feet in the air. A dumpster filled with disgusting garbage is placed at one end of an alley.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended high in the air. Player is placed in a coffin with 100 chicken feet and is then covered in rats. Couples stunt one of the team members is hog tied by four ropes and suspended.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Bruce Lee faces an underground criminal element after members of his family begin disappearing. Now he must break his vow of non-violence to take on the terrifying "Big Boss.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Legendary Bruce Lee's only complete directorial film is packed with action and epic fight scenes. Lee visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: Billy Lo, a champion fighter and movie star, fakes his death to escape and then expose the crime syndicate that wants to control him.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por Café 36, un restaurante franco-estadounidense en Illinois.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Macomb Township, Michigan, para inspeccionar Giuseppe's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay llega a Jack's Waterfront y está horrorizado por la falta de mariscos frescos y la falta de atención de la gerencia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a Los Ángeles para inspeccionar Sante La Brea. Descubre a un propietario con problemas financieros que no es respetado por su personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Cuando el Chef Ramsay regresa a Finn McCool's, The Olde Stone Mill, The Mixing Bowl, Dillon's, Campania's y Peter's, encuentra restaurantes salvados del borde del desastre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic comes to the rescue of a town that is held for ransom by Robotnik's crime syndicate. A few scenes from the pilot animation are integrated into this episode.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A chemical accident caused by Coconuts ends up giving superpowers to Robotnik, who quickly uses them to threaten Mobius's world leaders and publicly humiliate Sonic. However, Robotnik isn't completely invincible.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An asteroid is heading for Turtle Town and Robotnik offers to save it, but only if Sonic agrees to play in the Robolympics against him and his robots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic becomes the sheriff of Tranquil Gulch, in hopes of keeping Robotnik's robots from harassing the locals.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik goes time-traveling to find four Chaos Emeralds that could make him all-powerful. His first stop is the time of Blackbeard the Pirate, where he enlists the pirate's help to find the Emerald of Invisibility.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's next stop in his time-travel is the time of King Arfur and the Knights of the Round Table to get the Emerald of Invincibility. Sonic follows him, but Robotnik, with the unwilling help of local wizard Merlynx, obtains the Emerald.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Winter's Dream
programme.desc: A former ski champion reenters the competitive world when a 16-year old downhill racer asks for help leading her to reawaken an old passion and find a new love. Stars Dean Cain and Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: The Town Christmas Forgot
programme.desc: An upscale, urban family that can't seem to get along gets stranded in a remote, impoverished lumber town two days before Christmas. Stars Lauren Holly and Rick Roberts.

programme.title: November Christmas
programme.desc: With the support of his small town, a father's wish for his very sick daughter is realized. Stars Sam Elliott, John Corbett, and Sarah Paulson. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: The Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Charlotte Hart is spending the holidays with her family in their small town.

programme.title: Tis the Season for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An out-of-work actress returns to her quaint hometown.

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Interior designer Laura returns to Utah to spearhead the renovation of a hotel.

programme.title: Ice Sculpture Christmas

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is the beautiful bride and Mork is the outrageously funny groom - who may not be able to fit into his tuxedo if he can't convince Orson to approve the marriage and undo his transformation of Mork into an English sheep dog.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne tries to restore her new boyfriend’s self-confidence after he fails to stand up to some tough guys.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne swings into action when she believes the man she's been dating—a former trapeze artist—is out to kill her.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne pretends to be a woman with-child in order to help her pregnant friend win prizes in a contest for mothers-to-be.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: While checking up on her new photographer boyfriend at a fashion show, Laverne creates chaos when she is mistaken for a model.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and the gang fearfully gather in an attempt to rid Laverne's apartment of an odd ghost that has suddenly taken up residence.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Lenny and Squiggy set off on a frantic search for their fortune when they find a treasure map.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Carmine is a national sensation when he performs a song and dance routine, supposedly laced with wicked messages on television.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls go on a disastrous double-blind date.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is dazed at the reality that she and Mork are the parents of Mearth -half-earthling/half-orkan with the body of a 50-year-old and the mind of an infant and feels lef t out when Mearth accepts Mork as his mommy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork buys Mearth a fortune in presents to assure his happiness, and when Mindy, fearing a spoiled child, orders that they be returned, their unusual child decides they don't love him anymore.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy, already worried about losing her job at the television station, foresees disaster when Mork and Mearth accidentally transfer minds, forcing her to take Mearth in Mork’s body to meet the new boss.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Terror-stricken Mork believes the examiner assigned to give him a driving test is an incarnation of the devil, and careens along the test course in a spectacular tilted wheelie, with Mindy and Mearth in the car.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All of Mork's Earth memory is zapped into thin air by vengeful Orson on Ork when Mork neglects his job of reporting back to his planet because of family responsibilities.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Cunningham family plans a quiet, old-fashioned family Christmas until Richie discovers Fonzie faces a lonely holiday.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley is left dateless due to her dating standards.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: During a late summer heatwave, Ty's dad shows up with a truck full of sick, thirsty horses bound for the slaughterhouse. Amy recognizes one of the horses and the mystery deepens.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Much to her mother's dismay, Ashley is staying at Heartland and has promoted herself to VP of guest relations. Ty is still trying to make amends with Amy for his latest relationship snafu.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's patience is tried as Tim recovers from his shooting injury at Heartland. Amy uncovers some surprises about an ex-owner of a horse she's hoping to re-home.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hollywood starlet Mindy Fanshaw arrives at Heartland under the pretext of honing her non-existent riding skills in anticipation of an upcoming role.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa meddles in Lou's business and personal life with disastrous results. Mackenzie comes back to Heartland to get married, but when a cursed horse also arrives, the wedding is almost called off.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An oil company begins unwanted exploration on Heartland property, so Lou mobilizes the community against them.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hoping that Heartland will have a therapeutic effect on two tough kids on probation, Clint Riley books into the dude ranch for a weekend of team building and discipline.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Kit asks Ty to help her re-home a horse that she was given. Lou resurrects the Hudson Derby as a fundraiser event to help Mrs. Bell and others with some county legal problems.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Spartan is stolen and turns up at a horse auction. He is bought by Wes, the man who tried to burn down Fleming's barn. Amy is determined to get Spartan back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After a traumatized Spartan refuses to jump, Amy takes him to a man who fixes horses and hearts. Meanwhile, Ty struggles to tame his new horse, Harley, on his own.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty and Amy make a trip up to the mountains. But when Ty passes out with a high fever and a blizzard approaches, their remote location is a problem.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An accident on the highway involving a school bus and a trailer full of horses leads to sudden fame for Amy and a surge of business at Heartland.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Business is booming at Heartland. Amy finds herself caught in the middle of a family crisis when she tries to help a girl and her horse recover from what appears to be a freak accident.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's truck is on its way to rust bucket heaven, forcing him to find the courage to say goodbye to a part of his past.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol's friend Annie uses Carol to win Mike's affection.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben passes out a pornographic telephone number at school, he blames it on his best friend.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike becomes Employee of the Month and his parents buy him a car, but soon he must tell them he's been fired.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Carol does her best to alter her saintly reputation, Mike gets physical to protect his sister's honor.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike tricks his brother and sister again, the whole family decides to get even with a con of their own.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie get into an argument over a mandatory dress code in the schools.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben invites a runaway kid home for Christmas, the Seavers learn about charity and the value of family.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After being caught in a lie, Maggie grounds herself to teach Mike a lesson despite an impending Sinatra show.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol is given the chance to skip a grade in school, while Mike looks forward to a date with an older woman.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The teacher's student assistant changes Mike's grade to an A so she can be his date on a ski trip.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: It's time for the Spring Formal, and Mike has his hands full, as three different girls want to go with him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol has a slumber party, Ben and Mike can't resist scaring her friends.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Maggie and Jason spend the evening at home, Mike faces peer pressure and questions whether to use drugs.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ben becomes interested in girls but doesn't understand them. He learns Mike and Jason are still learning, too.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie say "no" to a nose job, but Carol seems determined - until Mike makes a startling admission.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie immerses herself in a school carnival, Ben feels ignored, and Jason almost drowns.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben researches his family's history, he finds evidence his mother and father have both been divorced.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The experiences of a distraught, expectant father teach Mike the value of an education.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: It's Chore Day at the Seaver house, and Ben attempts to record the day's events for a school project.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie gets a job offer from a newspaper editor with ulterior motives, Jason faces an ethical dilemma.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part episode, Jason faces a potential mutiny from his unhappy family on vacation.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In the second of a two-part episode, Jason faces a potential mutiny from his unhappy family on vacation.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike takes a job at a stereo store managed by a troublemaker from his past, his morals are tested.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After being turned down for a job again, Maggie becomes convinced she isn't meant to have a career.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After class clown Mike Seaver is nominated for student body president, scandal erupts at Dewey High School.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike's influence with Ben is threatened after Carol helps Ben convince their parents to pay for a new bike.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike's crush is chosen as a lead in the high school play, he auditions for leading man and wins the part.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Burglars ransack the Seaver home and steal the family's most valuable possession - their sense of safety.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol's head is turned by a new student, Carol's relationship with her boyfriend Bobby becomes rocky.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Every December in the small town of Ponchatoula, La., a wooden wishing box is placed in the park as a Christmas tradition. People write down their true heart's desire on a slip of paper and place it in the box.

programme.title: A Family for the Holidays
programme.desc: Ian plans what he thinks is the perfect marriage proposal at a bucolic Vermont inn, but things do not go as planned.

programme.title: My Favorite Christmas Melody
programme.desc: Once a promising singer-songwriter, Abby now finds herself writing uninspired jingles for commercials. As she heads home for the holidays, Abby soon rediscovers her voice as a local music teacher enlists her to help save a school arts program.

programme.title: Lonestar Christmas
programme.desc: Erin takes her daughters to spend Christmas with her estranged dad on his Texas ranch, where she unexpectedly falls in love with local restaurateur Mateo while learning to forgive her father for the past.

programme.title: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: A woman hopes to impress her new boss and the cute guy in her cubicle, but she is forced to wear an ugly Christmas sweater that she got from her eccentric grandmother.

programme.title: Writing Around the Christmas Tree
programme.desc: A romance novelist meets a dashing author at a holiday writer's retreat who convinces her that to write about love, she must, first, experience it.

programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: Bones

programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate when pulverized human remains are found in a garbage bag; Angela's father (Billy F. Gibbons) seeks revenge on Hodgins.

programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to have been living under an alias created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases from 20 years ago.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Navy ensign from the Office of Naval Intelligence is murdered, Special Agent Ned Dorneget (Matt Jones) from NCIS cyber operations helps investigate; Jake and Gibbs' friendship is revealed.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A case escalates into a global initiative when it's discovered that an international terrorist group that recruits children has been buying bombs off the black market.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 12 de diciembre de 1998, dos personas armadas secuestraron a 3 bedeles que iban a hacer la limpieza en el almacén de cajeros automáticos de un banco en Las Vegas y los mantuvieron de rehenes después de ingresar a la instalación.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Henderson, un suburbio de Las Vegas, dos ladrones que portaban rifles de asalto emboscaron y asesinaron a dos guardias armados mientras salían con un camión en marzo de 2000 y robaron miles de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 12 de febrero de 1997, dos hombres usaron una almádena para entrar en una casa de Camden, Nueva Jersey, y uno de los intrusos resultó herido cuando el propietario les disparó mientras intentaban escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando los criminales violentos atacan, el FBI contraataca: emplea cada recurso disponible y, de ser necesario, crea otros.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En los años setenta, el Otpor, un ala violenta de la Resistencia Nacional Croata, cometió actos terroristas en contra de los que no apoyaban el movimiento en los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una serie de robos e invasiones de propiedad tuvieron lugar en el área de Detroit. Los ladrones resultaron ser parte de una banda local apodada “Los invasores de casas”, cuyos crímenes abarcaban fraudes al seguro, robo, y operaciones ilegales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Esta es la historia de la primera captura del FBI de un terrorista internacional libanés. En junio de 1985, el terrorista y sus cuatro cómplices secuestraron el avión de una aerolínea poco después de despegar de Beirut.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de la década de los setenta, el FBI tuvo conocimiento de que había terroristas anticastristas operando en los Estados Unidos. Pero entonces apareció un nuevo grupo, más violento y agresivo que sus predecesores.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años setenta y principios de los ochenta, un grupo terrorista conocido como las FALN es considerado sospechoso de colocar bombas en ciudades importantes de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Filadelfia, una lucha despiadada para hacerse con el poder condujo a una guerra de la mafia a gran escala. La familia del crimen de la mafia local se dividió en dos mientras los jóvenes y los mayores se enfrentaban a muerte.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años ochenta, el FBI tuvo una batalla de inteligencia con un astuto ladrón de bancos. Él hacía una planificación meticulosa y ejecutaba sus crímenes con precisión militar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Puerto Rico, combatientes violentos intentaron convertir el estado autónomo de Estados Unidos en una dictadura comunista.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En los años ochenta, el comercio de drogas hizo estragos en los vecindarios dentro de la ciudad de Chicago, y los crímenes violentos amenazaban con destruir comunidades enteras.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: In the dark of night aliens fly their war ships to earth and abduct all the parents in Jimmy’s hometown of Retroville. So it’s up to Jimmy to rescue the abducted parents.

programme.title: Escape from Planet Earth
programme.desc: When a hero astronaut from the blue-alien planet Baab (Brendan Fraser) gets trapped on a notoriously dangerous planet called Earth, his risk-averse brother (Rob Corddry) must save him.

programme.title: Astro Boy
programme.desc: In futuristic Metro City, scientist Tenma (voiced by Nicolas Cage) creates an amazing robot boy with hidden talents unlike anything you've ever seen.

programme.title: Santa's Magic Toy Bag
programme.desc: Sherman, an apprentice Elf, tries his best to fit in but can't seem to do anything right! Santa tries to bolster his self-esteem by entrusting him with a special task. From the creator of the character Alf!

programme.title: Christmas Carol: The Movie
programme.desc: Capture the spirit of Christmas with this animated classic! Based on one of the most beloved holiday tales of all time and featuring the voices of some of today's brightest stars, this enchanting film is a very merry treat for the whole family!

programme.title: Elliot: The Littlest Reindeer
programme.desc: Elliot, a small but determined horse, travels to the North Pole to compete for a spot alongside the famous reindeer that pull Santa's sleigh. Against all odds, Elliot and his friend Hazel the goat set out to prove that no dream is too big.

programme.title: Yes, Virginia
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this is a touching and uplifting holiday story about what it means to believe. In New York City, 1897, eight-year-old Virginia O'Hanlon has always loved Christmas until the day her classmates question the existence of Santa.

programme.title: Snow White's Christmas Adventure
programme.desc: Experience a light-hearted twist on the classic tale. Snow White must save her beloved prince and show the world the true meaning of Christmas in this enchanting holiday film.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines’ inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd’s rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas’ lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly’s Boarding School, they discover it’s a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon’s new Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth’s Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn’t have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock’ and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon’s Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
